steps.title: Identify why tools mattered
steps.content: The text says Hale gained more customers and then began using sewing machines and other tools to produce bags more efficiently. The tools helped him keep up with growing demand while still handcrafting key details.

steps.title: Infer the likely consequence
steps.content: Choice A is wrong because he continued handcrafting unique details after using machines. Choice C is not tied to the machines. Choice D concerns customer interest, but the issue was production efficiency. Without machines, demand would be harder to meet. The answer is B.
